source_papers.title: Esketamine Nasal Spray: Mechanism of Action, Clinical, and Translational Science
Evaluation of Current Evidence on the Efficacy of Esketamine in Treating Substance-Use Disorders in Patients With Treatment-Resistant Depression (TRD): A Narrative Review
Low-dose intravenous esketamine on a depressive catatonia patient with venous thromboembolism: a case report
Intranasal Esketamine in Patients with Treatment-resistant Depression Who Have Previously Failed Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation: A Case Series.
Effectiveness of repeated Esketamine nasal spray administration on anhedonic symptoms in treatment-resistant bipolar and unipolar depression: A secondary analysis from the REAL-ESK study group
The effects of esketamine and treatment expectation in acute major depressive disorder (Expect): study protocol for a pharmacological fMRI study using a balanced placebo design
Reactive oxygen species in status epilepticus
Remission of functional motor symptoms following esketamine administration in a patient with treatment-resistant depression: a single-case report
Practical recommendations for the management of treatment-resistant depression with esketamine nasal spray therapy: Basic science, evidence-based knowledge and expert guidance

scoring.formula: score = min((log(ab+1) + log(bc+1)) * novelty / 10, 1.0); novelty = 1.0 if direct==0 else 0.7 / (direct+1)
